title: Jamie's Paneras Squash Soup
description: Seared cubed chicken thigh and tender pearl onions stirred into Panera's Autumn Squash Soup, seasoned with garlic and rosemary. Served with buttered scali bread.

items: 1 tub frozen Panera Autumn Squash Soup

instructions: Heat the soup in a medium saucepan.
Cut the chicken thigh into cubes, removing some of the fat — keep the fat.

In a frying pan, sear the chicken in olive oil with salt, pepper, garlic, the pearl onions, and the separated chicken fat. Sear until the chicken has a slight char on the outside and is cooked through, and the onions are tender.
Season the soup with salt, pepper, garlic, and rosemary. Once hot, add the chicken and onions, leaving the fat behind in the pan.

notes.label: Tip
notes.text: Scali bread is a soft Italian sesame loaf — buttered and lightly toasted, it's perfect for dipping.
